title: DNS Cutover Mission Inputs
description: Per-cutover configuration. Pinned at mission open in <consumer_vault>/how/missions/mission_<id>_dns_cutover_<domain>/audit/inputs.json.

vercel_org_id.description: Vercel team/org ID from same file.

vercel_token_keychain_name.description: macOS Keychain entry name holding the Vercel API token. Retrieved via 'security find-generic-password -a $USER -s <name> -w'. Token must NEVER be passed as 'vercel --token=' CLI flag (leaks via ps -ef); always set as VERCEL_TOKEN env var.

domain_apex.description: Bare domain, lowercase, no scheme, no www. E.g., 'worldgeno.me'.

canonical_form.description: Which form is the user-visible canonical URL. 'apex' = https://<domain>; 'www' = https://www.<domain>. Affects DNS shape (see skill apex-vs-www addendum).

dev_subdomain_enabled.description: If true, configure dev.<domain> as a Vercel Branch Domain bound to dev_branch_name.

dev_branch_name.description: Git branch name bound to the dev subdomain (only used if dev_subdomain_enabled).

consumer_vault_path.description: Absolute path to the consumer vault root.

cutover_window_iso.description: Operator-named cutover window start (ISO-8601 UTC). Pinned at P-T-24 close; must be >=24h after that close. Null until pinned.

existing_email_provider.description: Drives the email-continuity check's expected MX/SPF/DKIM records.

vercel_dns_subdomain.description: Vercel-issued project-specific CNAME target (e.g., '895869db08eb5498.vercel-dns-017.com.'). Captured from 'vercel domains inspect <domain>' after Vercel-side domain provisioning. Null until captured.

vercel_apex_ips.description: Vercel-issued apex A-record targets. Default ['216.198.79.1', '64.29.17.1'] (as of M08 2026-05-28; Vercel may rotate — re-capture from dashboard at P-D).
